title: [MTR3/4] Slumbering Tartarus's Fictional Buses
description: All of the buses that I've created, for both MTR3 and MTR4.
body:
The full collection of my buses. Each version contains 1 fictional bus that you can add to your MTR world. All buses require the MTR mod for the pack to work! These are the buses that you currently can add to your transit world:
* = Available for MTR4

- s020
- s015
- s015-DB
- s030*
- s025
- EVB1*

More will be added soon!

These buses do contain displays, just like on a real bus. Note that all of these buses only have doors on the right, except for the s020 & s030, which has doors not only on the right side, but on the left side too! These buses will make good use in your MTR world!
